sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bignum (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value BIGNUM);
UPDATE test_bignum SET value = value + 1000000000000000000000000000 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_bignum WHERE value > 1000000000000000000000000000;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_bignum WHERE value < -1234567890123456789012345678901234567890;
